---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment (AUTO-WRAP, robust)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "6/5/25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

##############################################################################
## Transcriptomics → GO / KEGG → Reactome enrichment (Gallus gallus)        ##
## + diagnostics, Excel export, auto‑wrapped dot‑plots (robust)             ##
##############################################################################

## 0. CONFIGURATION -----------------------------------------------------------
input_file   <- "pygo_MAIN.csv"   # DE table: gene, logFC, padj
species_name <- "chicken"         # ReactomePA shorthand
kegg_code    <- "gga"             # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff  <- 0.05              # adjusted‑P significance threshold
logFC_cutoff <- 3                 # minimum |log2FC| to keep
topN         <- 1000              # keep top N up + N down genes

## 1. INSTALL & LOAD PACKAGES ------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
cran_pkgs <- c("UpSetR", "EnhancedVolcano", "stringr", "glue")
to_install <- cran_pkgs[!sapply(cran_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install, dependencies = TRUE)

bio_pkgs <- c("clusterProfiler", "ReactomePA", "pathview", "biomaRt",
              "AnnotationDbi", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "openxlsx",
              "ComplexHeatmap", "circlize", "enrichplot")
bio_install <- bio_pkgs[!sapply(bio_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(bio_install)) BiocManager::install(bio_install, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
if (!requireNamespace("org.Gg.eg.db", quietly = TRUE)) BiocManager::install("org.Gg.eg.db", ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)

library(clusterProfiler); library(ReactomePA); library(pathview)
library(biomaRt); library(AnnotationDbi); library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2); library(openxlsx); library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize); library(UpSetR); library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(enrichplot); library(stringr); library(glue); library(org.Gg.eg.db)
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)

## 2. READ & PREP DATA --------------------------------------------------------
tbl_raw <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE)
tbl <- tbl_raw |>
  rename(gene = 1, logFC = 2, padj = 3)

gene2entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(orgDb,
  keys = tbl$gene, columns = "ENTREZID", keytype = "SYMBOL")

tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene2entrez, by = c("gene" = "SYMBOL")) |>
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

gene_universe <- as.character(tbl$ENTREZID)   # <- was numeric
sig_genes     <- unique(as.character(tbl_sig$ENTREZID))  # <- was numeric


tbl_sig <- tbl |>
  filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff) |>
  arrange(desc(logFC))
if (nrow(tbl_sig) > 2 * topN) {
  tbl_sig <- bind_rows(head(tbl_sig, topN), tail(tbl_sig, topN))
}

sig_genes <- unique(tbl_sig$ENTREZID)

# === SUMMARY STATS ===========================================================
num_input    <- nrow(tbl_raw)
num_mapped   <- nrow(tbl)
num_universe <- length(unique(gene_universe))
num_sig      <- length(sig_genes)
pct_sig      <- 100 * num_sig / num_universe
num_unmapped <- num_input - num_mapped

cat(sprintf(
  "\n====== SUMMARY ======\nInput genes:    %d\nMapped genes:   %d\nUnmapped genes: %d\nUniverse:       %d\nTest set:       %d (%.1f%% of universe)\n", 
  num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig, pct_sig))

summary_stats <- data.frame(
  Step       = c("Input genes", "Mapped genes", "Unmapped genes", "Universe", "Test set"),
  Gene_Count = c(num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig),
  Percent    = c(NA, 100 * num_mapped / num_input, 100 * num_unmapped / num_input, NA, pct_sig)
)
write.xlsx(summary_stats, file = "output/summary_stats.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)

# PIE CHART ------------------------------------------------------------------
pdf("output/testset_vs_universe_pie.pdf", 5, 5)
pie(c(num_sig, num_universe - num_sig),
    labels = c(sprintf("Test set\n(%d)", num_sig), sprintf("Universe\n(%d)", num_universe - num_sig)),
    col = c("deepskyblue", "grey90"),
    main = "Genes in Test Set vs. Universe")
dev.off()

# BARPLOT --------------------------------------------------------------------
bar_vals <- c(Input = num_input, Mapped = num_mapped, Universe = num_universe, TestSet = num_sig)
pdf("output/gene_counts_barplot.pdf", 5, 4)
barplot(bar_vals,
  main = "Gene Counts at Key Steps",
  ylab = "Number of genes", col = "darkseagreen",
  ylim = c(0, max(bar_vals) * 1.1))
dev.off()

knitr::kable(summary_stats, caption = "Summary of gene set filtering steps")

## 3. ENRICHMENT ANALYSES -----------------------------------------------------
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene = sig_genes, OrgDb = orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP",
  universe = gene_universe, pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = TRUE)

ekegg <- enrichKEGG(
  gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe, organism = kegg_code,
  keyType = "ncbi-geneid", minGSSize = 1, pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0) ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

ereact <- enrichPathway(
  gene = sig_genes, universe = gene_universe, organism = species_name,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH", readable = TRUE)

# preranked GSEA --------------------------------------------------------------
ranks <- tbl |>
  arrange(desc(logFC)) |>
  transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = logFC) |>
  tibble::deframe()

gsea_go <- gseGO(geneList = ranks, OrgDb = orgDb, ont = "BP", pAdjustMethod = "BH")
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) gsea_go <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

## 4. EXPORT TABLES (OVERALL ANALYSIS) ----------------------------------------
as_df <- function(res, id_col = "geneID") {
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  dplyr::rename(as.data.frame(res), Genes = !!id_col)
}

write.xlsx(list(
  GO_ORA   = as_df(ego),
  KEGG_ORA = as_df(ekegg),
  Reactome = as_df(ereact),
  GO_GSEA  = as_df(gsea_go, "core_enrichment"),
  Summary  = summary_stats
), file = "output/enrichment_results_with_genes_and_summary.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)

## 5. PLOTTING HELPERS --------------------------------------------------------
save_plot <- function(p, fname, w = 7, h = 5) ggsave(file.path("output", fname), plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in")

make_dot <- function(res, stub, title, n_cat = 15, wrap_width = 45,
                     text_size = 9, text_angle = 0, w = 7, h = 5) {
  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible())
  df <- df[seq_len(min(n_cat, nrow(df))), ]
  df$Description <- stringr::str_wrap(df$Description, width = wrap_width)

  if ("GeneRatio" %in% names(df) && "Count" %in% names(df)) {
    df$GeneRatioNum <- sapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"), function(x) as.numeric(x[1]) / as.numeric(x[2]))
    x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else if ("NES" %in% names(df) && "setSize" %in% names(df)) {
    x_var <- "NES"; x_lab <- "NES"; size_var <- "setSize"
  } else stop("Unsupported enrichment object")
  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = x_var,
                             y = paste0("reorder(Description,", x_var, ")"),
                             size = size_var,
                             colour = "p.adjust")) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_colour_continuous(low = "red", high = "blue", name = "adj-P") +
    scale_size(range = c(2, 6)) +
    labs(title = title, x = x_lab, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = text_size,
                                     angle = text_angle,
                                     hjust = ifelse(text_angle == 0, 1, 0.5)))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf", stub), w, h)
}

## 6. VISUALISATIONS ----------------------------------------------------------
# Volcano plot
volc <- EnhancedVolcano(tbl, lab = tbl$gene, x = "logFC", y = "padj",
  xlab = bquote(~Log[2]~" fold change"),
  pCutoff = padj_cutoff, FCcutoff = logFC_cutoff,
  selectLab = tbl_sig$gene)
save_plot(volc, "volcano_plot.pdf", 7, 6)

# Focused volcano plot (topN)
topNGenes <- 40
bigW <- 9; bigH <- 8

tbl_top <- tbl |> filter(padj < padj_cutoff) |> arrange(padj, desc(abs(logFC))) |> slice_head(n = topNGenes)

volc_focus <- EnhancedVolcano(
  tbl,
  lab            = tbl$gene,
  x              = "logFC",
  y              = "padj",
  pCutoff        = padj_cutoff,
  FCcutoff       = logFC_cutoff,
  selectLab      = tbl_top$gene,
  labSize        = 5,
  colAlpha       = .6,
  title          = glue("Focused volcano ({topNGenes} top genes highlighted)"),
  subtitle       = "Ordered by adjusted P-value then |log2FC|",
  caption        = ""
)
save_plot(volc_focus, "volcano_top_genes_large.pdf", bigW, bigH)

# logFC bins
pdf("output/logFC_bins_barplot.pdf", 6, 4)
barplot(table(cut(abs(tbl$logFC), c(0, 1, 2, 4, 8, Inf), labels = c("<1", "1-2", "2-4", "4-8", ">8"))),
        main = "Distribution of |log2FC|", ylab = "Gene count", xlab = "|log2FC| bin")
dev.off()

# UpSet enrichment plot (robust + debug)
terms <- list()
if (nrow(as_df(ego)) > 0)    terms$GO_BP    <- na.omit(unique(as_df(ego)$Description))
if (nrow(as_df(ekegg)) > 0)  terms$KEGG     <- na.omit(unique(as_df(ekegg)$Description))
if (nrow(as_df(ereact)) > 0) terms$Reactome <- na.omit(unique(as_df(ereact)$Description))

if (length(terms) > 1 && all(sapply(terms, length) > 0)) {
  pdf("output/upset_enrichment_terms.pdf", 7, 5)
  tryCatch({
    UpSetR::upset(fromList(terms),
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Shared terms",
      sets.x.label = "Term count")
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("UpSetR error: ", e$message)
  })
  dev.off()
} else {
  term_counts <- sapply(terms, length)
  bar_df <- data.frame(Category = names(term_counts), Count = as.numeric(term_counts))
  pdf("output/enrichment_term_counts_barplot.pdf", 6, 4)
  print(
    ggplot(bar_df, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      theme_bw() +
      labs(title = "Enrichment term counts", y = "Number of terms", x = "Category")
  )
  dev.off()
}

# Cnetplot
if (nrow(as_df(ego))) save_plot(cnetplot(ego, showCategory = 10, node_label = "all"), "cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 8)
make_dot(ego,      "GO_ORA",      "GO BP ORA")
make_dot(ekegg,    "KEGG_ORA",    "KEGG ORA")
make_dot(ereact,   "Reactome_ORA","Reactome ORA")
make_dot(gsea_go,  "GO_GSEA",     "GO GSEA (preranked)")

# ============================= NEW VISUALIZATIONS =============================
# 1. Enrichment map (emapplot) for GO ORA
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ego)) > 0) {
  ego_sim <- pairwise_termsim(ego)
  emapplot_out <- enrichplot::emapplot(ego_sim, showCategory = 30, repel = TRUE)
  save_plot(emapplot_out, "emapplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 7)
}

# 2. GSEA running score plots for top 3 GSEA terms
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
  pdf("output/gsea_running_score.pdf", 9, 6)
  for (id in head(gsea_go@result$ID, 3)) print(enrichplot::gseaplot2(gsea_go, geneSetID = id))
  dev.off()
}

library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go)) > 0) {
  # Top 3 GSEA terms
  top_gsea <- head(gsea_go@result, 3)
  
  # Get leading edge ENTREZIDs for each term
  leading_edge_long <- top_gsea |>
    select(ID, Description, core_enrichment, NES, p.adjust) |>
    tidyr::separate_rows(core_enrichment, sep = "/") |>
    dplyr::rename(ENTREZID = core_enrichment)
  
  # Merge logFC and gene symbol
  leading_edge_long <- leading_edge_long |>
    left_join(tbl[, c("ENTREZID", "gene", "logFC")], by = "ENTREZID")
  
  # Warn about unmatched IDs
  unmatched <- leading_edge_long %>% filter(is.na(logFC))
  if (nrow(unmatched) > 0) {
    warning("Some leading edge genes could not be matched to input data (no logFC):")
    print(unique(unmatched$ENTREZID))
  }
  
  # Export all
  write.xlsx(leading_edge_long, file = "output/gsea_leading_edge_genes.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
  
  # Plot only if there are matching genes with logFC
  for (term in unique(leading_edge_long$ID)) {
    le_term <- leading_edge_long[leading_edge_long$ID == term & !is.na(leading_edge_long$logFC), ]
    if (nrow(le_term) > 0) {
      topN_le <- le_term %>% arrange(desc(abs(logFC))) %>% head(25)
      p <- ggplot(topN_le, aes(x = reorder(gene, logFC), y = logFC, fill = logFC)) +
        geom_col() +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = glue("Leading-edge genes: {unique(topN_le$Description)}"),
             x = "Gene symbol", y = "log2 fold change") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "royalblue", high = "firebrick", mid = "white")
      save_plot(p, sprintf("gsea_leading_edge_%s.pdf", term), 8, 5)
    } else {
      message(glue("No matching logFC for leading edge genes in term {term}."))
    }
  }
}

# 3. KEGG pathway diagrams for top 3 hits using pathview
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0) {
  top_kegg <- head(as.data.frame(ekegg)$ID, 3)
  for (pid in top_kegg) {
    tryCatch({
      pathview(gene.data = tbl$logFC, pathway.id = pid, species = kegg_code, out.suffix = "logFC")
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Pathview error for KEGG pathway ", pid, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}
# ======================= END NEW VISUALIZATIONS ==============================

cat("\n✓ All done! Check 'output/' for Excel + plots.\n")

# --- 7.1: Broadened neural keyword search ---------------------------------
neural_kw <- c("neuro", "synap", "axon", "dendrit", "neur", "brain", "nerv", "glia", "myelin", "schwann",
               "spine", "plasticity", "cerebral", "cerebell", "cortex", "spinal", "ganglia", "astrocyte", "oligodendro", "hippocamp", "amygdala")

pick_neural_terms <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0 || !("Description" %in% colnames(df))) return(df)
  df[ grepl(paste(neural_kw, collapse="|"), df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE) , , drop=FALSE ]
}

neural_ora   <- pick_neural_terms( as.data.frame(ego) )
neural_gsea  <- pick_neural_terms( as.data.frame(gsea_go) )

cat(sprintf("\nFound %d neural GO-BP terms in ORA; %d in preranked GSEA\n",
            nrow(neural_ora), nrow(neural_gsea)))

if (nrow(neural_ora) > 0) print(neural_ora$Description)
if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) print(neural_gsea$Description)

# --- 7.2: Dot-plots (neural only) ------------------------------------------
if (nrow(neural_ora) > 0) make_dot(neural_ora, "GO_ORA_NEURAL", "Neural GO-BP ORA (subset)")
if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) make_dot(neural_gsea, "GO_GSEA_NEURAL", "Neural GO-BP GSEA (subset)")

# --- 7.3: Ridge-plots (robust; only if at least 3 terms) -------------------
fc_vec <- setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID)

# Ridgeplot for ORA
if (nrow(neural_ora) >= 3 && "ID" %in% colnames(neural_ora)) {
  neural_ora_ids <- na.omit(neural_ora$ID)
  N_ora <- min(length(neural_ora_ids), 15)
  if (N_ora >= 1) {
    plot_height <- 0.5 * N_ora + 2
    print(glue::glue("Ridgeplot ORA neural terms: {paste(head(neural_ora_ids, N_ora), collapse=', ')}"))
    pdf("output/ridgeplot_GO_ORA_NEURAL.pdf", 7, plot_height)
    p <- enrichplot::ridgeplot(ego, showCategory = neural_ora_ids, foldChange = fc_vec) +
      labs(x = "log2 fold change", y = NULL) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))
    print(p)
    dev.off()
  } else {
    message("No valid neural ORA term IDs for ridgeplot.")
  }
}

# Ridgeplot for GSEA
if (nrow(neural_gsea) >= 3 && "ID" %in% colnames(neural_gsea)) {
  neural_gsea_ids <- na.omit(neural_gsea$ID)
  neural_rows <- which(gsea_go@result$ID %in% neural_gsea_ids)
  if (length(neural_rows) >= 3) {
    N_gsea <- min(length(neural_rows), 15)
    plot_height <- 0.5 * N_gsea + 2
    print(glue::glue("Ridgeplot GSEA neural terms (top {N_gsea} of {length(neural_rows)} neural terms)"))
    gsea_go_neural <- gsea_go
    gsea_go_neural@result <- gsea_go@result[neural_rows, , drop = FALSE]
    pdf("output/ridgeplot_GO_GSEA_NEURAL.pdf", 7, plot_height)
    p <- enrichplot::ridgeplot(gsea_go_neural, showCategory = N_gsea) +
      labs(x = "Enrichment score (NES)", y = NULL) +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))
    print(p)
    dev.off()
  } else {
    message("Not enough neural GSEA terms found in gsea_go for ridgeplot.")
  }
}

# --- 7.4: Cnetplot (if neural terms in ORA) ---------------------------------
if (nrow(neural_ora) > 0) {
  save_plot(
    cnetplot(ego, showCategory = na.omit(neural_ora$ID), foldChange = fc_vec, node_label = "all"),
    "cnetplot_GO_ORA_NEURAL.pdf", 10, 8
  )
}

# --- 7.5: Heatmap of neural gene logFC --------------------------------------
if ((nrow(neural_ora) > 0) | (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0)) {
  neural_gene_vec <- unique( unlist( strsplit(
    c(neural_ora$geneID, if ("core_enrichment" %in% colnames(neural_gsea)) neural_gsea$core_enrichment else NULL), "/") ) )
  neural_gene_tbl <- tbl |> filter(ENTREZID %in% neural_gene_vec)
  if (nrow(neural_gene_tbl) > 0) {
    mat <- matrix(neural_gene_tbl$logFC, nrow = 1, dimnames = list(NULL, neural_gene_tbl$gene))
    col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(c(-max(abs(mat)), 0, max(abs(mat))), c("royalblue", "white", "firebrick"))
    pdf("output/heatmap_neural_gene_logFC.pdf", 8, 2.5)
    ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat, name = "log2FC", col = col_fun, cluster_columns = TRUE,
                            show_row_names = FALSE, column_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 7))
    dev.off()
  }
}

# --- 7.6: Save summary stats for neural portion (in a separate file) --------
neural_summary <- data.frame(
  Set = c("Neural ORA", "Neural GSEA"),
  N_terms = c(nrow(neural_ora), nrow(neural_gsea)),
  Top_term_ORA = c(if (nrow(neural_ora) > 0) neural_ora$Description[1] else NA, NA),
  Top_term_GSEA = c(NA, if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) neural_gsea$Description[1] else NA)
)
write.xlsx(list(
  Neural_GO_ORA  = neural_ora,
  Neural_GO_GSEA = neural_gsea,
  Neural_Summary = neural_summary
), file = "output/enrichment_neural_only.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)

cat("\n✓ Neural-focused analysis complete – see 'output/'\n")

```
